titleZh: AI时代的营销变革：品牌如何争夺信息影响力
titleEn: The Marketing Transformation in the AI Era: How Brands Can Compete for Information Influence
descriptionZh: 无论是今天赋能单一营销环节，还是未来重构整个营销机制，人工智能正在推动营销走向结构性转型。

title: AI节省的时间去哪儿了？
description: Anthropic 对 80,508 名真实人士进行了一对一的深度人工智能访谈，这是同类研究中规模最大的定性研究。
titleZh: AI节省的时间去哪儿了？
titleEn: Where Did the Time Saved by AI Go? The Answers from Over 80,000 People Are Sobering
descriptionZh: Anthropic 对 80,508 名真实人士进行了一对一的深度人工智能访谈，这是同类研究中规模最大的定性研究。
descriptionEn: Anthropic conducted one-on-one, in-depth AI interviews with 80,508 real people—the largest qualitative study of its kind. What people want most isn't more powerful AI, but more time. Yet, where does the saved time go? The answers in this report are more unsettling than any tech release.

title: OpenAI帝国濒临崩溃，奥特曼急招3500人逆袭，克劳德抢夺70%新订单
description: 就在一个月前，他还大声主张“大幅放缓招聘速度”，但现在奥特曼却转身宣布计划今年将劳动力人数增加一倍！
titleZh: OpenAI帝国濒临崩溃，奥特曼急招3500人逆袭，克劳德抢夺70%新订单
titleEn: The OpenAI Empire on the Brink of Collapse, Altman Rushes to Hire 3,500 for Counterattack, Claude Snatches 70% of New Orders
descriptionZh: 就在一个月前，他还大声主张“大幅放缓招聘速度”，但现在奥特曼却转身宣布计划今年将劳动力人数增加一倍！
descriptionEn: Just a month ago, he was loudly advocating for "significantly slowing down hiring," but Altman has now turned around and announced plans to double the workforce this year! 3,500 new recruits will be deployed across four major battlefields: product, engineering, research, and sales, along with a new "Technical Ambassador" corps, shattering OpenAI's "myth of downsizing" on the spot.

title: 刚才，人工智能美国
description: 一个不存在的金发女兵，用人工智能合成的脸，以爱国的形象欺骗了百万直男，收割了无数的钱包——而这个骗局或许只是人工智能生成的假身份入侵现实世界的开场。
titleZh: 刚才，人工智能美国
titleEn: Just Now, AI 'U.S. Military Goddess' Scams Across America, Gains 1 Million Followers in 4 Months, Meta Bans Overnight
descriptionZh: 一个不存在的金发女兵，用人工智能合成的脸，以爱国的形象欺骗了百万直男，收割了无数的钱包——而这个骗局或许只是人工智能生成的假身份入侵现实世界的开场。
descriptionEn: A non-existent blonde female soldier, using an AI-synthesized face, deceived a million straight men and harvested countless wallets with a patriotic persona—and this scam might just be the opening act for AI-generated fake identities invading the real world.

title: 谷歌最新科学论文颠覆了人类对 ASI 的想象
description: 最新的《科学》论文颠覆了“技术奇点”的叙述：真正的智能爆炸已经发生，但这并不是一个孤独的超级大脑的到来；而是真正的智能爆炸。
titleZh: 谷歌最新科学论文颠覆了人类对 ASI 的想象
titleEn: Google's Latest Science Paper Overturns Human Imagination of ASI
descriptionZh: 最新的《科学》论文颠覆了“技术奇点”的叙述：真正的智能爆炸已经发生，但这并不是一个孤独的超级大脑的到来；而是真正的智能爆炸。
descriptionEn: The latest Science paper subverts the 'technological singularity' narrative: the true intelligence explosion is already happening, but it's not the arrival of a lone super-brain; it's a societal leap driven by the deep entanglement of humans and AI. Reasoning models spontaneously give rise to internal 'societies of thought,' and the 'centaur era' of human-machine hybrids has already begun. The question was never whether the singularity would arrive, but whether we can build the matching societal infrastructure.

title: 在线音乐平台忙于抵御苏打水，人工智能几乎“洗劫他们的家”

descriptionZh: 谁能保证未来用户不会发现人工智能生成的内容优于人类创建的内容？
descriptionEn: Who can guarantee that in the future, users won't find AI-generated content superior to that created by humans?

title: 打造青少年“AI私人教练”，走进全国200多所学校，《满分体育》获数千万元A轮融资 |
description: 截至2025年底，满分体育已进入全国11个城市的200所学校，包括北京仁大中学、清华附中、重庆八中、东北育才学校、深圳外国语学校、杭州学军中学等一流院校。
titleZh: 打造青少年“AI私人教练”，走进全国200多所学校，《满分体育》获数千万元A轮融资 |

descriptionZh: 截至2025年底，满分体育已进入全国11个城市的200所学校，包括北京仁大中学、清华附中、重庆八中、东北育才学校、深圳外国语学校、杭州学军中学等一流院校。
descriptionEn: By the end of 2025, Full Score Sports had entered 200 schools across 11 cities in China, including top-tier institutions such as Beijing Renda High School, Tsinghua High School, Chongqing No.8 Middle School, Northeast Yucai School, Shenzhen Foreign Languages School, and Hangzhou Xuejun High School. Its products have been integrated into the formal physical education curriculum system, covering over 300,000 young users.
